allow:
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import ast, sys
files = [
    'src/trading/tools/__init__.py',
    'src/trading/tools/registry.py',
    'src/trading/tools/executor.py',
    'src/trading/tools/fallback.py',
    'src/trading/tools/market_tools.py',
    'src/trading/tools/context_tools.py',
    'src/trading/tools/portfolio_tools.py',
    'src/trading/risk/emergency.py',
    'src/trading/db/session.py',
    'tests/conftest.py',
    'tests/tools/test_registry.py',
    'tests/tools/test_executor.py',
    'tests/tools/test_fallback.py',
    'tests/tools/test_market_tools.py',
    'tests/tools/test_context_tools.py',
    'tests/tools/test_portfolio_tools.py',
    'tests/personas/test_base.py',
    'tests/personas/test_orchestrator.py',
    'tests/bot/test_telegram_commands.py',
]
errors = []
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        errors.append\(f'{f}: {e}'\)
if errors:
    print\('SYNTAX ERRORS:'\)
    for e in errors:
        print\(f'  {e}'\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
else:
    print\(f'All {len\(files\)} files parse successfully \(Python {sys.version_info.major}.{sys.version_info.minor}\)'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -c "
from trading.personas.orchestrator import run_pre_market_cycle, run_weekly_macro, _run_reflection_loop, _get_persona_tools
from trading.personas.base import call_persona, PersonaResult, MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS
from trading.tools.registry import get_tools_for_persona
print\('All imports OK'\)
print\(f'MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS = {MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS}'\)
print\(f'PersonaResult fields: {[f.name for f in PersonaResult.__dataclass_fields__.values\(\)]}'\)
print\(f'Micro tools count: {len\(get_tools_for_persona\(\\"micro\\"\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Decision tools count: {len\(get_tools_for_persona\(\\"decision\\"\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Risk tools count: {len\(get_tools_for_persona\(\\"risk\\"\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Macro tools count: {len\(get_tools_for_persona\(\\"macro\\"\)\)}'\)
")
